---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FinClaw
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to an existing frustration?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Include CLI examples if applicable:

```bash
finclaw <your-proposed-command>
```

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about?

## Category

- [ ] 📊 New data source / exchange
- [ ] 📈 Strategy / backtesting
- [ ] 🤖 AI features (copilot, generation, MCP)
- [ ] 🔧 CLI / UX improvement
- [ ] 🔌 Integration (Telegram, API, etc.)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, links, or screenshots.
